description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy shaped like a round animal, possibly a bird or a chick, with a predominantly white body. It features orange accents on the beak, feet, and a small crest on top of its head, as well as two circular patches for cheeks—one pink and one black. The toy has two small, rounded wings on either side and a pair of black circular eyes set above the beak. The surface appears soft and slightly fuzzy, typical of plush toys, with visible seams and some minor surface irregularities. The overall form is plump and huggable, with a simple, cartoon-like facial expression. This toy would likely be found in urban environments such as parks, playgrounds, or residential areas, possibly as a lost or discarded item.
description: A round, white plush toy resembling a cartoon bird or chick with orange beak, feet, and crest, and simple black and pink facial features. It has small wings and a soft, fuzzy surface.
description_view_0: The front view shows the face with black eyes, orange beak, and pink and black cheek patches clearly visible.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the rounded body, orange crest, and one of the small wings, with the face partially visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the head, orange crest, and both wings, with the face mostly obscured.
description_view_3: This opposite side view shows the other wing, orange foot, and the pink cheek patch, with the face in partial profile.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and friendly, with round black eyes and a small orange beak. The pink and black cheek patches add a playful, gentle touch.
attribute_pose_or_posture: The toy is in a relaxed, rounded posture with its wings slightly extended from the sides and feet tucked underneath the body.
